ast.name: error
ast.target: 编译模式错误，函数代码：

ast.name: error
ast.target: anchorNode 和/或 focusNode 为 null

ast.name: error
ast.target: [hashi] 在 onunload 期间清理抛出异常：

ast.name: log
ast.source: container.copy is deprecated since Docker v1.8.x
ast.target: container.copy 自 Docker v1.8.x 起已弃用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write verbose executor output to the developer console.
ast.target: 将详细的执行器输出写入开发者控制台。

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 强制重新连接（未选择实例）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Instance method `debug.destroy()` is deprecated and no longer does anything. It will be removed in the next major version of `debug`.
ast.target: 实例方法 `debug.destroy()` 已弃用且不再执行任何操作。它将在 `debug` 的下一个主要版本中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: these parameters are deprecated, see docs for addKeyword
ast.target: 这些参数已弃用，请参阅 addKeyword 的文档

ast.name: warn
ast.source: keywords option as map is deprecated, pass array
ast.target: keywords 选项作为映射已弃用，请传递数组

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Opening link blocked as opener could not be cleared
ast.target: 由于无法清除 opener，打开链接被阻止

ast.name: warn
ast.source: writeSync is unreliable and will be removed soon.
ast.target: writeSync 不可靠，将很快移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: async parser handler taking longer than 5000 ms
ast.target: 异步解析器处理程序耗时超过 5000 毫秒

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: IDE 桥接令牌已重新生成

ast.name: description
ast.source: gRPC Library for Node - pure JS implementation
ast.target: 用于 Node 的 gRPC 库 - 纯 JS 实现

ast.name: description
ast.source: Meta-schema for $data reference (JSON AnySchema extension proposal)
ast.target: 用于 $data 引用的元模式（JSON AnySchema 扩展提案）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return the current editor selection and cursor position, or null when no markdown editor is active.
ast.target: 返回当前编辑器选择和光标位置，如果没有活动的 Markdown 编辑器则返回 null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return the last selection broadcast by the selection tracker, or null when no selection has been recorded yet.
ast.target: 返回选择跟踪器广播的最后选择，如果尚未记录任何选择则返回 null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all currently open markdown editor tabs with their vault-relative file paths.
ast.target: 列出所有当前打开的 Markdown 编辑器标签页及其相对于保险库的文件路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open a vault file by vault-relative path in the Obsidian workspace.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 工作区中通过相对于保险库的路径打开保险库文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return the workspace folder list. Always returns an empty array — the vault host path is intentionally not exposed.
ast.target: 返回工作区文件夹列表。始终返回空数组 — 保险库主机路径有意不暴露。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return file diagnostics. Always returns an empty list — Obsidian does not expose per-file diagnostics to plugins.
ast.target: 返回文件诊断信息。始终返回空列表 — Obsidian 不向插件暴露每个文件的诊断信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check whether a document has unsaved changes. Always returns isDirty: false — Obsidian auto-saves.
ast.target: 检查文档是否有未保存的更改。始终返回 isDirty: false — Obsidian 自动保存。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Save a document explicitly. Always succeeds — Obsidian auto-saves all documents.
ast.target: 显式保存文档。始终成功 — Obsidian 自动保存所有文档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Close an editor tab. Always reports success — tab lifecycle is managed by Obsidian.
ast.target: 关闭编辑器标签页。始终报告成功 — 标签页生命周期由 Obsidian 管理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Close all diff editor tabs. Always returns 0 — Obsidian does not have diff tabs.
ast.target: 关闭所有差异编辑器标签页。始终返回 0 — Obsidian 没有差异标签页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Canonical, machine-readable instruction set produced by instruction-render.py. Consumed by Tomo Hashi (Obsidian plugin) for execution and rendered to a human-readable markdown view.
ast.target: 由 instruction-render.py 生成的规范、机器可读指令集。由 Tomo Hashi（Obsidian 插件）消费以执行，并渲染为人类可读的 Markdown 视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filename (vault-relative or stem) of the suggestions doc this set was derived from.
ast.target: 此指令集派生自的建议文档的文件名（相对于保险库或词干）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 生成的 ISO-8601 UTC 时间戳。

ast.name: description
ast.target: vault-config.yaml 中的活动配置文件名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tomo version that produced this file.
ast.target: 生成此文件的 Tomo 版本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Monotonic action identifier (I01, I02, …). Unique within the instruction set.
ast.target: 单调操作标识符（I01, I02, …）。在指令集中唯一。

ast.name: description
ast.source: True when Tomo Hashi has successfully executed this action. Defaults to false on emission. Monotonic — Hashi only writes false → true; Tomo never re-emits true. Optional for v0.5.x backwards-compat (missing = treated as false).
ast.target: 当 Tomo Hashi 成功执行此操作时为 true。发出时默认为 false。单调 — Hashi 仅写入 false → true；Tomo 从不重新发出 true。对于 v0.5.x 向后兼容是可选的（缺失 = 视为 false）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative full path of the rendered file currently in the inbox (what gets moved), e.g. '100 Inbox/2026-04-21_1200_asahikawa-....md'.
ast.target: 当前在收件箱中的已渲染文件的相对于保险库的完整路径（将被移动的内容），例如 '100 Inbox/2026-04-21_1200_asahikawa-....md'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative full target path including the final filename, e.g. 'Atlas/202 Notes/Asahikawa — ....md'.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的完整目标路径，包括最终文件名，例如 'Atlas/202 Notes/Asahikawa — ....md'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Final title of the note (also the stem of the destination filename).
ast.target: 笔记的最终标题（也是目标文件名的词干）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Basename of the rendered file (redundant with source; kept for display).
ast.target: 已渲染文件的基本名称（与源冗余；保留用于显示）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative path of the original inbox item this note was derived from. The delete_source action is the operational signal for cleanup; by default the renderer emits a paired delete_source for this origin unless the user opts out via the suggestions doc's 'Keep origin' checkbox.
ast.target: 此笔记派生自的原始收件箱项目的可选相对于保险库的路径。delete_source 操作是清理的操作信号；默认情况下，渲染器会为此来源发出配对的 delete_source，除非用户通过建议文档的“保留来源”复选框选择退出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resolved vault-relative path of the MOC, if known.
ast.target: MOC 的已解析相对于保险库的路径（如果已知）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Where in the target MOC to find the insertion point. type=callout matches the callout opening line; type=heading matches a heading by text; type=line matches a body line by content.
ast.target: 在目标 MOC 中查找插入点的位置。type=callout 匹配标注开头行；type=heading 按文本匹配标题；type=line 按内容匹配正文行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Where to write relative to the matched anchor. inside (callout only) appends as last line of callout body with > prefix. after inserts immediately after the matched anchor's terminal line, verbatim.
ast.target: 相对于匹配锚点写入的位置。inside（仅限标注）作为标注正文的最后一行追加，带 > 前缀。after 在匹配锚点的终止行之后立即插入，逐字插入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pre-formatted line content to insert (bullet style, link form, etc. all decided Tomo-side). Hashi writes this verbatim, prepending '> ' only when placement=inside on a callout anchor.
ast.target: 要插入的预格式化行内容（项目符号样式、链接形式等均由 Tomo 端决定）。Hashi 逐字写入此内容，仅当 placement=inside 且锚点为标注时才添加 '> ' 前缀。

ast.name: description
ast.source: callout = match callout opening line (e.g. '[!blocks] Key Concepts'); heading = match heading text without # prefix (any heading level); line = match body line by literal content.
ast.target: callout = 匹配标注开头行（例如 '[!blocks] Key Concepts'）；heading = 匹配不带 # 前缀的标题文本（任何标题级别）；line = 按字面内容匹配正文行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content of the anchor to match. Null is permitted only at emission time when the renderer cannot resolve a concrete value yet (resolver populates later via Kado read).
ast.target: 要匹配的锚点内容。仅在发出时允许为 null，此时渲染器无法解析具体值（解析器稍后通过 Kado 读取填充）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: MOC stem for human-readable display (no path, no .md).
ast.target: 用于人类可读显示的 MOC 词干（无路径，无 .md）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resolved vault-relative path of the target MOC.
ast.target: 目标 MOC 的已解析相对于保险库的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dataview inline-field marker that locates the line to replace, e.g. 'up::' or 'related::'. Hashi locates the first line whose stripped content (after optional '> ' callout prefix) starts with this marker.
ast.target: 用于定位要替换的行的 Dataview 内联字段标记，例如 'up::' 或 'related::'。Hashi 定位剥离内容（去除可选的 '> ' 标注前缀后）以此标记开头的第一行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pre-formatted full line content to write, e.g. 'up:: [[Hobbies (MOC)]]' or 'related:: [[A]], [[B]]'. Hashi replaces the located marker line with this verbatim, preserving the line's leading '> ' prefix if the marker was inside a callout. Multi-link aggregation for related:: is done Tomo-side.
ast.target: 要写入的预格式化完整行内容，例如 'up:: [[Hobbies (MOC)]]' 或 'related:: [[A]], [[B]]'。Hashi 用此内容逐字替换定位到的标记行，如果标记位于标注内，则保留该行的前导 '> ' 前缀。related:: 的多链接聚合在 Tomo 端完成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Daily log heading (e.g. 'Daily Log'), without leading #.
ast.target: 每日日志标题（例如 'Daily Log'），不带前导 #。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative full path of the rendered MOC file currently in the inbox, e.g. '100 Inbox/2026-04-21_1200_brettspiele-moc.md'.
ast.target: 当前在收件箱中的已渲染 MOC 文件的相对于保险库的完整路径，例如 '100 Inbox/2026-04-21_1200_brettspiele-moc.md'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative full target path of the MOC, e.g. 'Atlas/200 Maps/Brettspiele (MOC).md'.
ast.target: MOC 的相对于保险库的完整目标路径，例如 'Atlas/200 Maps/Brettspiele (MOC).md'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Basename of the rendered MOC file (redundant with source; kept for display).
ast.target: 已渲染 MOC 文件的基本名称（与源冗余；保留用于显示）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Parent MOC stem for up-linking (emitted separately as an add_relationship action with marker='up::' on this MOC).
ast.target: 用于向上链接的父 MOC 词干（作为 add_relationship 操作单独发出，标记='up::'，作用于此 MOC）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Supporting items for this MOC. Suggestion-parser emits comma-separated SNN IDs (string), MOC-proposal-parser emits note titles (array). Both formats coexist.
ast.target: 此 MOC 的支持项。Suggestion-parser 发出逗号分隔的 SNN ID（字符串），MOC-proposal-parser 发出笔记标题（数组）。两种格式共存。

ast.name: detail
ast.source: No Tomo instance seems to be running — start one and try again.
ast.target: 似乎没有运行的 Tomo 实例 — 请启动一个并重试。

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match a schema in anyOf
ast.target: 必须匹配 anyOf 中的模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match exactly one schema in oneOf
ast.target: 必须精确匹配 oneOf 中的一个模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: invalid params: filePath must be a string
ast.target: 无效参数：filePath 必须是字符串

ast.name: message
ast.source: invalid params: filePath must not be empty
ast.target: 无效参数：filePath 不能为空

ast.name: title
ast.target: 核心与验证规范元模式

ast.name: title
ast.target: 未评估应用器词汇元模式

ast.name: title
ast.source: Format vocabulary meta-schema for annotation results
ast.target: 格式词汇元模式（用于注解结果）
